◎简　　介  

　　A documentary/reality TV series giving an unprecedented inside look into the magic of some of the world's top fashion and luxury brands, including Chanel, Cartier, Swarovski, Dunhill, Ermenegildo Zegna, Vertu, Tiffany, Montblanc, and Ports 1961.
